name: just-enough
description: just-enough — a general-purpose code-restraint discipline for AI coding agents (ponytail with taste).

plugins.name: just-enough
plugins.description: The best code is the code you never wrote — walks a reuse ladder (necessity → reuse what's here → stdlib/runtime primitive → native feature → installed or project-standard package → minimal code) before writing anything, marks deliberate simplifications with their upgrade path, leaves one tiny check for non-trivial logic, and stops at the shortest obvious solution: keep a clear one-liner, split hidden decisions.
